design_principles: Clean data and service visualization over decorative fluff
Asymmetric layouts to break the 'boring corporate' mold while maintaining authority
Generous negative space (p-12, p-24) to convey premium service

headings.strategy: Swiss Brutalist - strong weight contrast (Black vs Light). Do not use Inter or generic sans for headings.

body.strategy: Sterile, clean, highly legible for corporate financial data.

layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A) for Services overview on Home. Asymmetric overlapping sections for 'Quem Somos'.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-8, p-12, p-24 for section paddings. Avoid cramped layouts.

components.buttons: Square or very subtly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary button uses #0A1F44 background with white text. Hover state is a lighter navy (#102F63).
components.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px border (#E2E8F0). No heavy shadows. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-b border-slate-200). Sticky top, z-50. Must include language switcher (PT, EN, ES).
components.navigation: Desktop: Visible links. Services must be a Dropdown Menu. Mobile: Hamburger menu (Shadcn Sheet).
components.forms: Shadcn UI inputs. Left-aligned labels. Sharp edges.
components.icons: lucide-react for sharp, consistent corporate iconography.

pages.home: Hero section with strong H1, primary CTA. Bento grid for quick overview of Services. Trust indicators (mock partner logos). Latest 2-3 blog posts.
pages.quem_somos: About Us. Asymmetric layout combining corporate office imagery and textual narrative. Mission/Vision/Values.
pages.servicos: Detailed services page. Use Shadcn Accordion or Tabs for detailed breakdown (Contabilidade Geral, Fiscalidade, Recursos Humanos, Consultoria).
pages.blog: Pre-formatted list of articles. Use grid layout. Include placeholders for title, excerpt, date, image.
pages.recrutamento: Careers page. Open positions list. Simple application CTA.
pages.contactos: Contact Us. Split layout: Left side contact details, map embedded, social links (FB, IG, LI). Right side Shadcn form.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. Text links underline or color shift. Buttons change bg-color.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (framer-motion). Not overly bouncy. Professional ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth scroll (lenis) is recommended for a premium feel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gray backgrounds meets APCA standards. Navy blue on white is excellent.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, language switcher).

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the multi-page structure (Home, Quem Somos, Serviços, Blog, Recrutamento, Contacta-nos).
Build the language switcher in the Header (PT as default).
For Services, implement a hover/click dropdown in the Navigation.
Do NOT use purple or teal. Stick strictly to the White and Navy Blue (#0A1F44) palette.
Populate the Blog page with at least 3 well-formatted example posts using the finance chart and meeting images.
Integrate lucide-react for social icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn) on the Contact page and Footer.
Apply data-testid to every interactive element (e.g. data-testid='nav-home', data-testid='lang-switcher', data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Ensure the hero image has an appropriate overlay if text is placed on top of it, but prefer white background with text and image alongside for this archetype.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind classes for complex layouts; use Shadcn strictly for interactive UI components.
